news.t: Harbor Capital Advisors Launches Harbor AI Inflection Strategy ETF (Ticker: EPAI)

holdings.infoBox: EPAI is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are Applied Materials stock at 4.82%, Teradyne at 4.65%, Lam Research at 4.30%, Vertiv Holdings Co at 3.98%, and Flex Ltd. at 3.94%.

overview.description: The Harbor AI Inflection Strategy ETF (EPAI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed ETF, which invests in US companies that may benefit from the enablement and expansion of artificial intelligence yet considered overlooked by the market. The fund aims for long-term growth. EPAI was launched on Dec 18, 2025 and is issued by Harbor.
